productName: Honey Stixx - Infused Pre-roll - Flavored - Grape Kush.7g
description: This infused hybrid pre-roll wraps Grape flower around a concentrate boost (think kief, hash, distillate, or diamonds) for a louder aroma and a longer session. Boosted for extra strength and more intense effects — a sweet, candy-like grape flavor, with a versatile, anytime balance. A little goes a long way.
